heading: Planning and construction; transfer of funds
label: 422h Planning and construction; transfer of funds
text: The planning and construction of projects undertaken pursuant to this subchapter shall be subject to all procedural requirements and other provisions of the Fish and Wildlife Coordination Act (), as amended ( et seq.). The Secretary shall transfer to the Fish and Wildlife Service or to the National Marine Fisheries Service, out of appropriations or other funds made available under this subchapter, such funds as may be necessary to conduct the investigations required to carry out the purposes of this section.48 Stat. 40116 U.S.C. 661
notes: References in TextThe Fish and Wildlife Coordination Act (), as amended, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to sections 661 to 666c–1 of Title 16, Conservation. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see , Short Title note set out under , and Tables.48 Stat. 401act Mar. 10, 1934, ch. 5548 Stat. 401section 661(a) of Title 16section 661 of Title 16
